section.title: AI Exposure and Usage
section.description: This section asks about your current and recent exposure to AI tools in your project management work.

questions.text: Frequency of AI Tool Usage in Project Management:
questions.hint: Do you use any AI-powered tools as part of your project management responsibilities?

options.label: No – I do not use AI tools in my work
Rarely – A few times per month or less
Occasionally – Regularly, but not daily (e.g., a few times per week)
Daily – I use AI tools daily or in most projects

questions.hint: Which of the following AI-powered technologies or applications have you used for project management-related tasks? (Select all that apply)

options.label: General-purpose generative AI tools (e.g., ChatGPT, Google Gemini, Claude, Microsoft Copilot)
AI features embedded in project management or delivery tools (e.g., Jira AI, Asana, Monday.com, Microsoft Project, Azure DevOps)
AI-powered scheduling and resource optimization tools (e.g., timeline prediction, capacity planning)
Predictive analytics and forecasting tools (e.g., effort estimation, outcome forecasting, risk prediction)
Automated reporting and dashboards (e.g., AI-generated status reports or performance summaries)
Communication and collaboration assistants (e.g., meeting summaries, translation, sentiment analysis)
Process automation / RPA (e.g., automating routine coordination or administrative tasks)
Custom or internally developed AI / ML models for project management use cases
None – I have not used AI tools for project management
Other

questions.hint: How is AI currently integrated into your project management work?

options.label: Experimental / pilot use only (limited testing or trials)
Ad-hoc individual use (e.g., standalone tools or personal experimentation)
Embedded within project management or delivery tools
Organization-level adoption (standard tools, governance, and policies in place)
Not applicable – I do not use AI

questions.text: Clarity of Organizational Guidance on AI Use:
questions.hint: Rate your agreement with the statement: 'My organization has clear policies, guidance, and training related to AI use in project management.'

options.label: 1 - Strongly Disagree
2 - Disagree
3 - Neutral
4 - Agree
5 - Strongly Agree
N/A (No organizational AI guidance or no AI use)
